hero.title: Bio-based crop protection for healthier harvests.
hero.subtitle: Synergy Crop Solutions delivers innovative bio-fertilizers, bio-pesticides, and residue-free crop protection products that help farmers grow more while protecting the land for future generations.
hero.quote: Committed to residue-free farming. Trusted by growers across India. We partner with distributors and dealers to build a sustainable agricultural future.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.statement: To build a strong legacy in agriculture by bringing innovative residue-free solutions that create trust, growth, and prosperity for every partner.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.statement: To deliver new-generation crop protection products that are safe, effective, and residue-free, helping farmers improve harvests and helping distributors and dealers build lasting business.

crops.title: Browse by Crop
crops.subtitle: Find the right products for your field

distributors.title: Distributor Locator
distributors.subtitle: Connect with trusted supply partners
distributors.cardDesc: Locate certified Synergy Crop Solutions distributors and dealers in your region for timely access to bio-based crop protection products.

cta.title: Ready to grow with confidence?
cta.subtitle: Partner with Synergy Crop Solutions
cta.headline: Switch to bio-based, residue-free crop protection today.
